main.name: Hi there!
main.description: Software engineer and aspiring life enjoyer.
main.bio: I build distributed systems and ops tooling at DoorDash -- and explore the world the rest of the time. 40+ countries visited, most recently walking the Camino de Santiago across Spain and backpacking through Garibaldi Provincial Park in British Columbia. UCLA Computer Science grad with a background spanning logistics platforms, autonomous vehicles, and biomedical imaging. When I'm not traveling or shipping code, I'm in the gym, dialing in macros, or plotting the next adventure.
main.contactmessage: Feel free to reach out -- whether it's about code, travel, or the best ramen in Seattle.

resume.skillmessage: Languages and tools I work with day-to-day and have used in production

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering
education.description: GPA: 3.89/4.00 — Dean's Honors (all terms). Member of UPE and IEEE-HKN Honor Societies. IEEE-Eta Kappa Nu Membership Chair: organized orientation and induction for 50+ members. Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Operating Systems, Machine Learning, Embedded Systems, Computer Networks, Compilers, Parallel Programming, Linear Algebra.

work.title: Software Engineer — Logistics Platform
work.description: Building Task Console, a self-serve ops platform supporting 21 active Dasher task types across 6+ teams (DashMart, JETS, Waymo, Wolt). Shipped bulk task operations enabling 10,000+ tasks per batch. Architecting zero-downtime Pedregal migration via Kafka shadow pipeline. Migrated 16 pay configs from static JSON to CRDB-backed gRPC API, cutting new task onboarding from days to hours. Stack: Kotlin, Go, TypeScript, React, Kafka, gRPC, CRDB, DGS/GraphQL.

work.title: Founding Engineer (Part-time)
work.description: Co-founding an early-stage startup backed by the Google Startups Cloud Program. Building the core technical foundation part-time alongside my full-time role at DoorDash.

work.title: Software Engineering Intern (×2)
work.description: 2024: Built a React/Java platform for bulk upload/download of Amazon Business invoicing response rules, reducing rule configuration time by 80× and cutting rejection rate by 40%. Implemented Excel deserialization, validation, and rollback on partial failure. 2023: Built a C++/OpenCV application increasing Echo Show camera resolution using super-resolution algorithms. Achieved 40% average image quality improvement (PSNR/SSIM) across 4 SR algorithms and 2 upscaling factors.

work.title: Software Engineering Intern (×2)
work.description: 2023: Built an execution proxy for remote execution optimization, reducing operational costs by $100K/month. 2022: Designed C++ data structures to collect geometric lane data surrounding autonomous vehicles. Built a 3-layer RPC pipeline for front-end display. Contributed to a 62% expansion of the self-driving zone across San Francisco, Phoenix, and Austin.

projects.title: Task Console — DoorDash

projects.title: SeekEats

projects.title: Echo Show Super-Resolution
projects.category: C++/OpenCV app increasing Echo Show camera resolution by 40% using SR algorithms — Amazon internship

projects.title: Autonomous Vehicle Lane Data Pipeline
projects.category: 3-layer C++ pipeline for AV lane geometry transfer — contributed to 62% SF self-driving zone expansion (Cruise)

projects.title: Intellicom — FPGA Messaging System
projects.category: Bidirectional messaging system between FPGA boards using Bluetooth, UART, and MicroBlaze C

pieces.name: 春聯 New Year Couplet
pieces.story: A Chinese New Year couplet reading 梅傳春信宇 -- "Plum blossoms carry spring's message." Wishing joy, luck, and fortune throughout the year.

pieces.name: 馬到成功 Horse
pieces.story: 馬到成功 -- "Success upon the horse's arrival." A classic Chinese idiom for effortless achievement. Painted in traditional ink wash style.

pieces.name: 四季讀書 Joy of Reading
pieces.story: Four strips for spring, summer, fall, and winter -- each describing how the season's scenery spices up the joy of studying.

pieces.name: Painted Parasol
pieces.story: Chinese ink calligraphy and brush painting on a traditional oil-paper parasol.

pieces.name: 牡丹 Peonies
pieces.story: Peonies symbolize wealth, beauty, and prosperity in Chinese culture. Painted in traditional gongbi (工筆) style.

pieces.name: 琵琶行 Pipa Xing
pieces.story: A Tang Dynasty poem by Bai Juyi (白居易). A lady's mastery of the pipa parallels the author's anguish after political demotion -- insinuating that corruption overshadows true talent.

pieces.name: 新年祝福 New Year Blessings
pieces.story: Diamond-shaped cards. Left: 吉祥如意 (Auspicious luck and fulfilled wishes). Right: 招財進寶 (Attract wealth and treasures) -- a compound of four characters.

pieces.name: 行書 Running Script
pieces.story: Written in 行書 (xingshu) semi-cursive style. Describes how the author remains joyful when rain starts during a mountain hike -- reflecting optimism toward life's challenges.
